title: Stanislav Krapivnik: The Iran Lesson - Russia Must Restore Deterrence
summary:
Stanislav Krapivnik discusses how the Russian offensive in Ukraine is intensifying and why the lessons from Iran is pressuring the Kremlin to retaliate against Europe. Krapivnik is a former US Army officer, supply chain exec and military-political expert, now based in Russia. He was born in Lugansk during the Soviet times, migrated to the US as a child and served in the US army. 

Follow Prof. Glenn Diesen: 
Substack: https://glenndiesen.substack.com/ 
X/Twitter: https://x.com/Glenn_Diesen
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/glenndiesen 

Support the research by Prof. Glenn Diesen: 
PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/glenndiesen
Buy me a Coffee: buymeacoffee.com/gdieseng
Go Fund Me: https://gofund.me/09ea012f

Books by Prof. Glenn Diesen: 
https://www.amazon.com/stores/author/B09FPQ4MDL
